channel.title: debug on Jin's blog
channel.description: Recent content in debug on Jin's blog

item.title: Debug QEMU with GDB
item.description: Preface Recently I was writing a 32-bit kernel with zig, it is so useful, and when I develop it, I meet some situations where I need to use debugger. But now, zig doesn’t have official debugger. I tried bochs and qemu separately, Finally decided to use qemu. Qemu can debug with GDB remotely. Debug My system is wsl archlinux, and I install qemu-full and gdb. Here we only talk about how to debug.
